title: calea brachiata
intro: Calea brachiata, also known as Long-leaf Calea or Calea, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Calea brachiata is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
